name: JWT User Auth
title: FastAPI User Authentication with JWT
description: Create a secure user registration and login system in FastAPI. Use bcrypt for password hashing and pyjwt for issuing JSON Web Tokens. Guard a protected endpoint /users/me with Bearer JWT authentication.

name: JWT Refresh Token
title: Implement JWT Refresh Tokens
description: Design a token refresh flow. Store secure, HTTP-only refresh tokens in cookies with expiration, and allow clients to exchange them for short-lived access tokens via /auth/refresh. Invalidate old refresh tokens on use.

name: JWT Blacklist Redis
title: Revoke JWTs via Redis Blacklist
description: Implement a logout endpoint in FastAPI. Blacklist the user's active JWT in Redis for the remainder of its TTL, and reject requests using blacklisted tokens in a dependency function.

name: OAuth2 Discord Login
title: Discord OAuth2 Authorization Flow
description: Implement the complete authorization code grant flow for logging in users via Discord. Handle the redirect URL, code exchange for access token, and fetch the user's Discord profile details.

name: OAuth2 GitHub Login
title: GitHub OAuth2 Authorization Flow
description: Implement OAuth2 login with GitHub. Generate the authorization URL, handle the callback with the code, exchange for an access token, retrieve the user's GitHub profile, and create/update a user record in the database.

name: Role-Based Access Control
title: FastAPI RBAC Middleware
description: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) in FastAPI. Define ADMIN, EDITOR, and VIEWER roles. Enforce role checks using dependency injection on protected routes. Return 403 for insufficient permissions.

name: API Key Auth
title: API Key Authentication System
description: Create a system for API key-based authentication. Generate hashed API keys on user request, store the hash in PostgreSQL, and validate incoming API keys from the X-API-Key header for each protected endpoint.

name: MFA TOTP
title: Time-based OTP (TOTP) Multi-Factor Authentication
description: Implement TOTP-based MFA using pyotp. Generate a TOTP secret and QR code URL during setup, store the secret encrypted in the database, and verify TOTP codes on login. Support backup codes.

name: Session Auth Cookies
title: Server-Side Session Authentication
description: Implement server-side session authentication using httponly, secure, and SameSite=Strict cookies. Store session data in Redis with a 24-hour TTL. Implement session invalidation on logout.

name: Password Strength Validator
title: Password Strength Policy Enforcer
description: Create a password validator function in Python. Enforce complex password rules (minimum 12 characters, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character) and return descriptive validation error messages.

name: Email Verification Flow
title: Email Verification on Registration
description: Implement an email verification flow: generate a short-lived signed token on registration, send a verification link via email, and provide an endpoint to verify the token and activate the account.

name: Password Reset Flow
title: Secure Password Reset Endpoint
description: Create a secure password reset system. Generate a time-limited token hashed in the database, send a reset link to the user's email, verify the token, and update the password using bcrypt.
